title: Escape a Large Maze
hints: Notice the grid is huge but blocked cells are few. BFS/DFS will time out if exploring everything. What limits the reachable area?
The blocked cells can only trap the source or target in a tiny region. If you can step out of that small boundary, you can reach anywhere else.
Perform two separate BFS searches. If either search visits more cells than the maximum area encloseable by all blocked cells, return true immediately.
